# [Short imperative title]

**Type:** Feature | Fix | Refactor | Chore

## Summary

One to three sentences describing what this change is and why it matters.

## Description

The main body. Use paragraphs, lists, or subsections as needed.
Describe what should happen, not how to implement it.

Include on-screen behaviour, key bindings, edge cases, or constraints that are part of the requirement.

## Use Cases

Optional. Concrete scenarios that illustrate expected behaviour.

- When the user does X, then Y should happen.
- When there is no Z, the program defaults to W.

## Hints

Optional. Soft guidance, not implementation steps.

## Out of Scope

Optional. Explicit exclusions to prevent scope creep.
